name: IRC_CX_HEADERS_VL
query: SELECT IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.HEADER_ID, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.THEME_ID, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.TYPE, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.NAME, IRC_CX_HEADERS_TL.LOGO_URL, IRC_CX_HEADERS_TL.PROFILE_TEXT, IRC_CX_HEADERS_TL.EMPLOYEE_TEXT, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.CREATED_BY, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.CREATION_DATE, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM IRC_CX_HEADERS_B, IRC_CX_HEADERS_TL WHERE IRC_CX_HEADERS_B.HEADER_ID = IRC_CX_HEADERS_TL.HEADER_ID AND IRC_CX_HEADERS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
